form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr2) over 2240m at Goulburn, at the bell was 4th-7.4 beaten 11 m by Lit The Wick (2:49.50) in NR up to 52 on March 30 at $7. At her previous start 4th (Sr1) over 1720m at Young was 5th-15.2 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Shes Got A Reason (2:02.70) in NR up to 52 on March 24 at $8.50. Draws the inside so worth another chance.

form.formComment: Last start from midfield and won by a head after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Goulburn (2:02.90) beating Rocksie Rock in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $8.50 at the bell was 2nd-2.2. Winning claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and broke gait passing the 1500m when Fresh Prince broke gait.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 8 m finishing third behind Foxfire Easton at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 13 at $2.80. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.1 m finishing third behind Rocknroll Clarry at Menangle over 1609m in a 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 27 at $3.60. Strong claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced greenly under pressure over the final 100m.
Paced roughly for a short distance passing the 400m.
Shortly after the start became unbalanced and broke gait.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr2) over 2240m at Goulburn, at the bell was 6th-10.8 beaten 6 m by Lit The Wick (2:49.50) in NR up to 52 on March 30 at $17. Two runs back 3rd (Fr1) over 2170m at this track, at the bell was 3rd-4.4 beaten 7 m by Mister Bluechip (2:40.90) in NR up to 65 on March 15 at $21. Might find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: Last start on strong from last on the turn and won by 3.5 m as favourite when driven back in the field, when quickly away, (Fr5) held up early, at Goulburn (2:49.50) beating Titiwha in NR up to 52 on March 30 at $2.15 at the bell was 8th-15.9. Sure to be there at the business end.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr4) over 2240m after racing wide at Goulburn, at the bell was 2nd-2.3 beaten 7 m by Lit The Wick (2:49.50) in NR up to 52 on March 30 at $4.80. Showed ability the race before when he ran on from midfield and won by a head (Sr2) at Penrith (2:05.70) beating Flo Ryda in NR up to 58 on March 26 at $26 at the bell was 3rd-1.78. Capable of featuring.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Sr2) over 2170m at this track beaten 55 m by Mister Bluechip (2:40.90) in NR up to 65 on March 15 at $31. Two runs back 3rd (Sr1) over 2170m at this track, beaten 3 m by Thanks Be To God (2:40.80) in NR up to 65 on March 9 at $26. Looks safely held.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait during the score up and was out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr4) over 1730m after showing early speed at Bathurst beaten 9 m by Beyond Doubt (2:02.60) in No NR on March 25 at $19. At the start before solid effort when 2nd (Sr1) over 1730m at Bathurst was 4th-8.37 at the bell, beaten a head by Wishas Darling (2:04.00) in NR up to 60 on March 18 at $13. Can be about the money.
